commands.validation: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS=chromium npx playwright test tests/realworld-validation
commands.reportsGenerateSource: npm run benchmark:coverage:realworld && npx ts-node --transpile-only scripts/generate-realworld-corpus-report.ts && cross-env REPORT_GENERATION_SCOPE=taxonomy npx ts-node --transpile-only scripts/generate-operator-reports.ts && npx ts-node --transpile-only scripts/generate-pipeline-verification.ts
commands.reportsGenerateRun: cross-env REPORT_GENERATION_SCOPE=coverage npx ts-node --transpile-only scripts/generate-operator-reports.ts && npx ts-node --transpile-only scripts/generate-accessibility-summary-reports.ts
commands.reportsGenerate: npm run reports:generate:source && npm run reports:generate:run
commands.baselineChromium: cross-env APP_ID=angular-realworld-example-app BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=baseline npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts && cross-env APP_ID=realworld BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=baseline npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts && cross-env APP_ID=vue3-realworld-example-app BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=baseline npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts
commands.mutationSelected: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS=chromium APP_ID=angular-realworld-example-app BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=mutate npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts && cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS=chromium APP_ID=realworld BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=mutate npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts && cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS=chromium APP_ID=vue3-realworld-example-app BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=mutate npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts
commands.mutationSample: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS=chromium APP_ID=angular-realworld-example-app BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=mutate MUTATION_LIMIT=1 npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts && cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS=chromium APP_ID=realworld BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=mutate MUTATION_LIMIT=1 npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts && cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS=chromium APP_ID=vue3-realworld-example-app BENCHMARK_CORPUS_ID=realworld-active BENCHMARK_ACTIVE_MODE=mutate MUTATION_LIMIT=1 npx playwright test tests/realworld/benchmark-active.spec.ts
commands.aggregateAll: npx ts-node --transpile-only src/murun/runner/aggregate.ts test-results/angular-realworld-example-app/realworld-active/benchmark-runs test-results/angular-realworld-example-app/realworld-active/aggregate && npx ts-node --transpile-only src/murun/runner/aggregate.ts test-results/realworld/realworld-active/benchmark-runs test-results/realworld/realworld-active/aggregate && npx ts-node --transpile-only src/murun/runner/aggregate.ts test-results/vue3-realworld-example-app/realworld-active/benchmark-runs test-results/vue3-realworld-example-app/realworld-active/aggregate

notes: Chromium remains the primary benchmark environment unless the thesis methodology is revised in parallel.
Firefox and WebKit runs are tracked as supplementary smoke coverage and do not silently redefine the thesis dataset.
Mutation-sample preparation and collection stay pinned to Chromium so the selected corpus is generated in the primary benchmark environment.
Source-derived report freshness is enforced in PR validation, while run-derived summaries are regenerated from the currently available benchmark artifacts.
